overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a nighttime drive through a neon-lit futuristic city, entering a long concrete tunnel with fluorescent lighting, and exiting onto a winding highway with modern streetlights. The scene features wet reflective asphalt, holographic advertisements, and futuristic vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with holographic advertisements

events.description: vehicle approaches and enters the tunnel entrance marked by red neon vertical strips

agents.ego_description: cruising through the neon-lit city street toward the tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan passing by on the left side of the road

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard displaying animated pink and purple neon advertisement
concrete tunnel portal with distinctive vertical red neon light strips on the facade
tall illuminated buildings with glass facades visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a futuristic cyberpunk city street at night, passing towering holographic billboards glowing with pink neon light. The camera approaches a tunnel entrance framed by striking red vertical neon strips, with palm trees and illuminated skyscrapers silhouetted against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete vehicular tunnel with linear fluorescent ceiling lighting

events.description: red futuristic van approaches and passes in the opposite direction
silver sedan overtakes the vehicle on the right side
bright light from tunnel exit becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the long concrete tunnel, navigating past other vehicles

notable_agents.action: red van driving toward the camera in the opposite lane
silver sedan overtaking on the right and pulling ahead

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete walls with yellow painted base trim running along both sides
continuous linear white fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a long, enclosed concrete tunnel illuminated by stark linear fluorescent lights overhead. The smooth gray walls create a confined corridor effect as various futuristic cars pass by or are overtaken, with the tunnel exit gradually appearing as a bright point in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding highway with guardrails and pole-mounted LED streetlights

events.description: vehicle exits the tunnel into open night air with visible sky and landscape
road curves sharply to the right as the vehicle navigates the winding highway

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and accelerating onto the winding highway, following the road curves

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead on the winding road, navigating the curves

entered.detail: metal guardrails with orange reflective strips lining both sides of the highway
tall modern streetlights with horizontal LED bars casting light on the wet road
dark vegetated hillside rising alongside the highway with scattered trees

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into the open night, the vehicle enters a winding highway bordered by metal guardrails and modern pole-mounted streetlights. The road curves through a hilly landscape with dark vegetation on the slopes, while the wet asphalt reflects the artificial lighting and other vehicles navigate the bends ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a neon-drenched cyberpunk cityscape through a confined industrial corridor and out onto an open nocturnal highway. It begins by gliding past towering pink holographic billboards and silhouetted skyscrapers before approaching a tunnel entrance framed by striking red vertical neon strips. As the vehicle enters the tunnel, the vibrant city lights vanish, replaced by a confined corridor of smooth gray concrete and stark linear fluorescent lighting. The scene then shifts as the camera emerges from the tunnel's bright exit, transitioning from the enclosed space to a winding highway bordered by metal guardrails and modern streetlights. Finally, the road curves through a hilly landscape of dark vegetation, with the wet asphalt reflecting the artificial glow of the surrounding traffic.
